rationale: The evidence only shows a single DOI-matched reference, with no in-text citation context or quoted passage indicating how the 2002 targeted-promotion behaviorist model is used in the 2007 bundle-promotion study. While both papers are in promotion-response modeling, the citing note does not explicitly indicate adoption of the cited paper’s betrayal/jealousy Markov framework, so it is not safe to drop as merely incidental.
